titleStmt.title: SII 38.224: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 224. (A.R. No. 224 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the east wall, of the maṇḍapa infront of the Naṭarāja shrine, of the same temple.

summary.p: Records that the temple authorities gave an undertaking to uḍaiyār Aḻagiya Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār of Pullūr to provide for food offerings during the midnight service to the god, Tiruoṟṟi-ūr-uḍaiyanāyiṉār, in his name, as he is stated to have released two parcels of tax-free land each five thousand kuḻi (owned by the temple), from mortagage after remitting capital.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . man maṇḍalīśvaran viraśrītevarāyamahārāyaṟku cellā niṉṟa virotivaruṣam Āṭimātam Iraṇṭām tiyati
Āticaṇṭeśvaraṉ pullūruṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampala(m)muṭaiyār nallanāyanāṟku cilāle
kai paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi muṉnāḷ vaṭakarai tiṟappilum tirunāmattuk kāṇiyilum ciṟuverippulam ku 4 1000 5 100m marattuḻāṉ ku 1000m
paṉṟimulai ku 4 1000 5 100m Āka ku 10000m Iṟaiyili Oṟṟiāka vaikkaiyiThe letter ‘yi’ is engraved below this line.l Intak kuḻi patiṉāyirattukkum Oṟṟiyāl Uḷḷa mutaṟkuṭuttu viṭṭuk kuṭu
kkaiyil tammuṭaiya perāle Ivvūr tiruoṟṟiūruṭaiya nayiThe letter ‘yi’ is engraved below this line.ṉāṟkut tiruottacāmattukku Inta nilattil melvāranellu
ṟa Amutupaṭi veñcaṉattukkum cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Itukku Akitam paṇṇiṉā(r)ruṇṭākil Uṭaiyāṟkum ta ka k keṅkai
karaiyiṟ kurāṟpacuvaikkoṉṟa pāvattaip poka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakkumpaṭikkuc cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭuttom
Aruḷāl nāṟpatIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
